aeo_readiness.summary: Astoria Top HVAC has a decent foundation for AEO readiness but requires improvements in several areas to enhance visibility and engagement.
quick_wins: Increase the number of Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search presence.
Optimize website content with targeted HVAC-related keywords to improve search rankings.
Implement a blog section on the website to provide valuable content and improve SEO.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement, which are crucial for local search optimization.
critical_issues: No customer reviews on Google, which impacts local search rankings and customer trust.
Insufficient engagement on the GBP, such as responding to customer queries or updating business information regularly.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website but lacks citations on other relevant platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No Review schema to showcase customer testimonials and reviews.
No Service schema to provide detailed information about the services offered.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on Google Business Profile.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in the local area who rely on reviews and ratings to make decisions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Encouraging satisfied customers to leave reviews on Google and other platforms.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing informative content and engaging with the community on social media.
